scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && cp -r frontend/dist ./dist
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p dist && cp -r frontend/dist/* dist/
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
